title: Business
subtitle: Legal identity, customers, expenses, and people for this team.
listSubtitle: Each team runs one business. Pick one to see its identity, expenses, and people.
listEmpty: You don't have any businesses yet. Create a team to set up your first one.
noTeam: Pick a team to see business identity.

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.summary: {count, plural, =0 {No expenses yet this month} =1 {1 expense · {amount} this month} other {# expenses · {amount} this month}}

people.title: Employees & contractors
people.hint: Track people who work for the business. Coming soon.

info.title: Business identity
info.description: Legal name, tax IDs, entity form, and fiscal year — the formal details of the business behind this team.

fields.legalNameHelp: The formal registered name of the entity. Leave blank to use the team's display name.
fields.taxIdHelp: Stored as entered. Handle with care.
fields.fiscalYearStartHelp: Use 01-01 for calendar-year businesses, 07-01 for July-June fiscal year, etc.

stateRegistrations.sectionDescription: Every state where the business is formed or foreign-qualified. One row is the formation state; the rest are foreign qualifications.
stateRegistrations.empty: No state registrations yet. Add the formation state to get started.

fields.isFormation: This is where the business was originally formed
fields.isFormationHelp: Also called the formation state — where the business is legally domiciled. Exactly one per business; every other state registration is a foreign qualification.

people.title: People
people.description: Everyone the business employs, contracts, or otherwise tracks on payroll. A person may be linked to a Shyre user account or stand on their own — a 1099 contractor you pay doesn't need a Shyre login.
people.empty: No people yet. Add yourself first if you're the owner.

fields.legalNameHelp: Single line — matches W-2, 1099, W-9. Use the form the IRS prints. For business recipients (e.g. "Acme LLC"), enter the entity name.
fields.preferredNameHelp: Optional — override how this person appears in Shyre UI.
fields.userLinkHelp: Optional. When linked, avatar and login email come from their Shyre account via join. Legal name and work email stay on this record.
fields.workEmailHelp: Payroll / HR contact. Distinct from login email.
fields.title: Title
